stylePack.name: Space Wars
stylePack.description: [Advanced] It's Space Wars baby! Settle down your favorite desert planet and follow the motto: "Go Big or Go Home!" This style is not for the weak of heart, as it uses a lot of resources to build everything. Make sure it's a desert that you build this in.
